case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. FELIPE NUNO et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NUNO, FELIPE AKA FILIPE DE MINO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-12-2008
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT NUNO, FELIPE

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT FELIPE NUNO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. FELIPE NUNO HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
NOTICE AND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC HEARING SET FOR DEC-24-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
